description: Customer master data customer relationship records consent records and operations-facing interaction history. Authority for personal identifiers and consent state across Enercare. Dual ownership per Purview Phase 2.2 requirement of two Governance Domain Owners: Chief Customer Officer holds business accountability; Senior Manager Data Strategy & Analytics provides governance overlay and operates tenant-level Purview admin role.

Field operations service requests work orders technician dispatch equipment registry and territorial service zones. Authority for service-event and asset records. Dual ownership: Enercare Leadership Data Plane primary; Senior Manager Data Strategy & Analytics provides governance overlay.

Products contracts billing transactions and revenue recognition surfaces subject to Ontario Consumer Protection Act and financial reporting controls. Includes auto-renewal disclosure compliance. Dual ownership: Senior Manager Data Strategy & Analytics primary; Enercare Leadership Data Plane provides cross-functional executive accountability.
